description_long: This is a large, ornate urn-shaped vase with a wide, flared mouth and two elaborate, curling handles on either side. The body is adorned with intricate relief decorations, including floral garlands and a central medallion featuring classical motifs. The rim and base are both embellished with detailed floral patterns, giving the vase a regal and antique appearance. The surface has a weathered, patinated finish, suggesting it is made of aged metal, likely bronze or cast iron. The interior appears to be hollow and dark, with some reddish-brown discoloration or residue visible at the top. This vase is substantial in size and would serve as a striking decorative feature in a public or garden setting.
description: A large, antique-style metal urn with ornate handles, floral reliefs, and a weathered patina. Its detailed decorations and grand form make it a prominent decorative piece.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ornate handles, the central medallion, and the full floral garland relief.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one handle in profile and the rounded body, with less detail visible on the medallion.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, similar to view 0, with both handles and the decorative reliefs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the other handle in profile and the vase's rounded form.
